Contact

I’m proud to be your MP for York Outer.”

I am incredibly proud to be your Member of Parliament for York Outer, my home, and live in the constituency with my wife and two young sons.

As your MP, I have been working hard on the issues that matter to you most and I am dedicated to service for York Outer.

Read more
Read more

Stay updated on social media

Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram

How can
I help you?

As your MP, I want to ensure I represent you in the best way I can. If you need my help, please visit my help pages below to learn more about how I can help you.

In Our Local Area

Tap each pinpoint to learn more about my work in the local area.

Meetings & Events

I welcome opportunities to meet with local groups, organisations and businesses throughout York Outer.

Please consider inviting me to your meeting or event, but understand that it will not always be possible, due to my parliamentary and other commitments.

Complete this form to invite me
to your meeting or event
